title: selaginella subsplendens
intro: Selaginella subsplendens, also known as the golden club moss, is a species of evergreen flowering plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella subsplendens include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
